# PowerScriptFormula.Text property

The decoded text form of the slot's `DT_STRING_FORMULA.Value`. For trivial-numeric slots this is the literal text (`"0.02"`, `"60"`, `".15"`, …); for expression slots this is an arithmetic expression over other SF_N references (`"SF_1 / 3"` on Demonic Spicules' SF_2).

```csharp
public string Text { get; set; }
```
